DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED; AND TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SETS ONE AND TWO, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SETS ONE AND TWO, AND DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND IS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $480, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Oct-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
JUANA MAYDEE RAMIREZ, IN PROPRIA PERSONA
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted as modified. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted; And To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Sets One And Two, and Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's Requests For Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Sets One And Two, and Defendant's Special Interrogatories within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's failure to respond is a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $480, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
